title: hedbergia longiflora subsp. macrophylla
intro: Hedbergia longiflora subsp. macrophylla, a plant species belonging to the family Aizoaceae, is native to South Africa and is also known as 'Karee Apple'. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Hedbergia longiflora subsp. macrophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and has also been used in traditional folk medicine for various purposes.
